posts.author: alexar (Alexa Reardon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I’m surprised to see that this hasn’t been added yet - we have a board where we limit visibility of certain columns to some staff members, and the same ability would be incredibly useful in the Updates feature.

What are you trying to achieve

Limit visibility for Updates for certain board users. I’d like to choose which updates get seen and which don’t.
